title: Blackspur BB-SD333 Mixed Precision Screwdriver Set
features: Set include are 6 slotted tip, 3 cross point tip, 1 awl and 1 magnet
Packed in a handy hinged plastic case
description: Blackspur mixed precision screwdrivers are manufactured with tempered steel blades. Packed in a handy hinged plastic case. Set include are 6x slotted, 3x cross point tips. 6x Slotted size: 1mm, 1.2mm, 1.4mm, 1.8mm, 2.4mm, 3mm. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK.
